sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CXT Q4 Deep Dive: Currency Demand, Authentication Advances, and Margin Pressures Shape Outlook
feed.summary: Crane NXT (NYSE:CXT) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, with revenue surpassing expectations due to significant demand in its currency business and new authentication technology contracts. Despite revenue growth, the company experienced a decline in adjusted operating margin caused by higher costs and foreign exchange impacts. Crane NXT's 2026 outlook projects continued growth in key segments but anticipates ongoing margin pressures and a back-end loaded year, especially with the upcoming launch of the redesigned U.S. $10 bill.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase names new COO to drive AI expansion
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase has appointed Guy Halamish as COO for its commercial and investment banking division, tasks with overseeing the expansion of AI tools. Halamish will work with leaders across various banking units and establish chief data and analytics officers within each division to maximize the impact of AI. CEO Jamie Dimon noted that AI cost savings already match the company's annual spending on the technology, which is currently used in over 175 applications for fraud detection, sanctions screening, and economic data analysis.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) stock edges lower in premarket after sharp drop as oil stays in focus
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum's stock edged lower in premarket trading after a significant drop, influenced by volatile oil prices and a softened demand outlook. Traders are closely monitoring U.S. inflation data and upcoming earnings reports from Occidental Petroleum, with oil prices continuing to fluctuate due to geopolitical factors and revised global demand forecasts. The company's stock performance is highly sensitive to crude oil movements, and investors are looking for clarity on production trends, costs, and debt reduction strategies from its upcoming Q4 2025 earnings call.

feed.title: UBS Downgrades Evergy to Neutral From Buy, Adjusts Price Target to $88 From $86
feed.summary: UBS has downgraded Evergy (EVRG) stock from "Buy" to "Neutral" and increased its price target from $86 to $88. This adjustment reflects the bank's revised outlook on the electric utility company. The article also provides a brief company profile for Evergy, including its production capacity and employee count, and lists other recent analyst activities for the stock.

feed.title: Mariner selects State Street’s Charles River wealth platform
feed.summary: Mariner has partnered with State Street to utilize its Charles River wealth platform as a core component of its long-term growth strategy. This move is aimed at expanding Mariner's advisor team from 2,080 to 5,000, streamlining operations, and providing a unified experience for advisors and clients. The platform integrates with State Street’s back-office functions and supports portfolio management, workflow automation, and trade execution.

feed.title: The Truth About Royal Caribbean Group: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Obsessed
feed.summary: This article examines the widespread obsession with Royal Caribbean Group, driven by its massive ships and viral social media presence. It explores whether the cruise experience lives up to the hype, analyzing the cost, target demographic, and competition with Carnival, while also providing a status check on the company's stock (RCL) for potential investors. The piece concludes by advising readers to consider their budget and risk tolerance before booking a trip or investing in the stock.

feed.title: KLA to invest $400 million in Tamil Nadu expansion
feed.summary: KLA Corporation will invest $400 million over the next decade to establish a new research and development and innovation campus in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. This expansion is set to strengthen KLA's presence in semiconductor process control and AI-led engineering in India, creating up to 4,000 jobs. The facility will become one of KLA’s largest global innovation hubs, reinforcing Tamil Nadu's position in the semiconductor value chain and supporting India's broader electronics and chip strategy.
